tasks.instruction: Start an enrollment form for a full-week preschool program suitable for a 4-year-old that offers full-day care Monday through Friday and ends at or after 5:30 PM, using a future weekday start date and selecting all weekdays for attendance.

target_names: Can I customize which newsletters and updates I receive?
